name: Braveheart The Dancing Dragon
description: This Is Braveheart He's a Dancing Dragon from the popular Game Adopt Me! The Dancing Dragon features a long, red wingless dragon with a yellow underbelly. It has a long, spiked yellow tail, four intense red and yellow feet, and yellow spikes on the top part of its back. On its head, it has two brown antlers, two red ears, yellow whiskers, two yellow eyebrows, and two small black eyes.
creator: PuroDarkness
